message:
fix(ft-optim): harden scheduler state_dict numeric field loading (frankentorch-7w2)

Introduced decode_exact_usize_field() and decode_exact_i64_field() helpers
that reject NaN, infinity, fractional values, and out-of-range floats before
casting to integer scheduler fields (step_size, t_max, t_0, t_mult, t_cur,
t_i, total_iters, patience, cooldown, num_bad_epochs, cooldown_counter,
total_steps, step_size_up, step_size_down, iteration, milestones). Invalid
values are silently skipped, preserving the previous field value rather than
producing corrupted or panicking state. Added four targeted regression tests
covering StepLR, MultiStepLR, CosineAnnealingWarmRestarts, and CyclicLR.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
